title: Debug puzzle
vignette: Dust where a hand once rested. Bread gone hard in the bowl. A bell that has forgotten its own echo, frozen in the shape of what’s now lost. A crest of a wave that has long since broken. A desk that has been left to gather dust. A bill that has been left unpaid. A chest that has been left open, its contents scattered to the wind. A ball that has lost its bounce. An ark that has been abandoned. An arm that has been severed from its body. An art that has been forgotten. An arch that has collapsed.

definitions: A curved structure spanning an opening
Something shaped like a curve or bow
A chest or box
A large boat, especially in biblical tradition
Either of the two upper limbs of the human body
A projecting part of an object, such as a chair or record player
Works created for beauty or expression, such as paintings or sculpture
Skill acquired through practice
A round object used in games and sports
A hollow metal object that rings when struck
The part of a flower that holds the petals
A statement of money owed
The beak of a bird
A round, deep dish used for food or liquid
A rigid bandage or shell used to hold a broken bone in place
A moulded or shaped mass of material
A large strong box for storage
The front part of the body between the neck and abdomen
The top of a hill or wave
An emblem or design on a coat of arms
The hard outer layer of bread
A hard outer coating or surface
A flat surface extending from a house or ship
A set of playing cards
A piece of furniture with a flat surface for writing or working
The darker stage of twilight
Fine, dry particles of matter
The remains of something destroyed
